title: lol totem
description: Changes the texture of the totem to emote 7tv :lol:
body:
RUS: Меняет текстуру тотема на эмоут 7tv :lol: . Звук так же заменен на фразу владика. 

ENG: Changes the texture of the totem to emote 7tv :lol: . The sound has also been replaced with the appropriate one.
